authority: bc-docs-v3 SSOT synthesis from A0.5 matrix + C1/C2 closure artifacts
objective: Track platform coverage as future BC target routing, not only substrate draft creation.

route_type_definitions.new_substrate_characteristic: BC targets route to a newly authored draft characteristic.
route_type_definitions.new_substrate_or_parent_enabled: BC targets are covered by a C1 draft or by a C1 parent characteristic confirmed to draft.
route_type_definitions.map_to_existing_characteristic: BC targets route to an existing substrate characteristic, usually with role qualifier and/or BC-level representation precision.
route_type_definitions.operator_semantic_decision_slice_blocked: Valid-looking value-property is premature because target entity slice is missing.
route_type_definitions.operator_semantic_decision_type_root: High-impact generic/root decision requiring operator framing under BC coverage lens.
route_type_definitions.held_residual_panel_or_reprep: Panel/packet residual held for future scoped remediation.
route_type_definitions.operator_semantic_decision_held: Semantic ambiguity held for operator decision.
route_type_definitions.defer_insufficient_evidence: Held due to insufficient evidence for admission or routing.
route_type_definitions.service_error_held: Transport failed without governed verdict; held for runtime investigation.
route_type_definitions.defer_or_reject: Current closure lens treats row as not productively routed.

known_arithmetic_notes: The live A0.5 C1 used_by_bc_target_count values sum to 147, not 145 as one retrospective note stated. This ledger uses live A0.5 values.
C1 source-row accounting and characteristic-term accounting are intentionally distinct per the C1 operator-decision packet; route_type keeps source-row coverage separate from substrate-row count.

C2 requested_execution_date_time is counted as map_to_existing under BC coverage because the post-panel defect is naming/precision-tail over-specification; operator naming remains before Pass-3 binding.

records.note: Operator-decision packet rejected generic type_code; BC coverage lens flags it as the largest unresolved root-vs-role decision.
